segments.text: That's enough even with blue Pikmin!

segments.original_text: カラゴン撃墜通したが

segments.text: I don't think there was over 100% damage gap
segments.original_text: 100%以上差があったとは思えない

segments.text: Depending on the recovery, that could be true
segments.original_text: 折り返しによっては本当

full_text: That's insane! That's enough even with blue Pikmin! That KO went through, but... I don't think there was over 100% damage gap The neutral Depending on the recovery, that could be true

corrections.original: 折り口によったら本話
corrections.corrected: 折り返しによっては本当
corrections.rule: Whisper mishearing: 折り口→折り返し, 本話→本当
